column3: (Content Security Policy (CSP) Header Not Set - will address with CSP implementation)
(Permissions Policy Header Not Set - low risk for internal app)
(Loosely Scoped Cookie - Azure auth cookies are scoped by platform)
(X-Frame-Options Header - should be set but not blocking)
(X-Content-Type-Options Header Missing - should be set but not blocking)
(Server Leaks Version Information - cosmetic but worth fixing)
(Cross Site Scripting Reflected - review findings from active scan)
(Cross Site Scripting Persistent - review findings from active scan)
(SQL Injection - review findings from active scan)
(CRLF Injection - review findings from active scan)
(Absence of Anti-CSRF Tokens - API uses JWT bearer auth, not cookies)
